title: "He That Doeth Righteousness Is Righteous" I John 3:4-10

notes.introduction: An exposition of 1 John 3:4-10 on the contrast between the one who does righteousness and the one who commits sin, addressed to believers within a verse-by-verse study of 1 John organized around the themes of sin, the Savior, and sanctification.
themes: the work of christ at calvary
children of god versus children of the devil

sections.heading: Introduction to the Passage and Its Litmus Test
John on Sin: Definition and Author
John on the Savior: Work at Calvary
John on Sanctification: Verb Tense and Abiding
The Litmus Test: Children of God and Children of the Devil
Abiding in Christ and Its Effect on Behavior
